title: B.Sc (Hons. with Research) Microbiology
content: *4-year Undergraduate Degree (Honours with Research) S. No. | Broad Category of Course | Minimum Credit Requirement for a4-Year UG Programme | 1 | Major (Core) | 80 | 2 | Minor Stream | 32 | 3 | Multidisciplinary | 09 | 4 | Ability Enhancement Courses (AEC) | 08 | 5 | Skill Enhancement Courses (SEC) | 09 | 6 | Value Added Courses common for all UG | 06-08 | 7 | Summer Internship | 02-04 | 8 | Research Project/ Dissertation | 12 | 9 | Total | 160 | 4-year UG Degree with Honours (Source: - UGC Curriculum & Credit Framework for Undergraduate Programmes) XIIth with PCB with minimum 50% marks. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons/Hons with Research) Microbiology Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. 01 To Provide students with in-depth knowledge of microbial biology, including structure, classification, physiology, genetics, and ecology of microorganisms. 02 Cultivate a scientific mindset, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills through experimental work, projects, and research-based learning. 01 02 03 04 05 Environment and sustainability: Understand the impact of professional, scientific solutions in societal and environmental contexts and demonstrate the knowledge of and need for sustainable development. 06 07 08 Life-long learning: Recognize the need for and have the preparation and ability to engage in independent and life-long learning in the broadest context of technological change. 01 Graduates will be inspired to explore and understand the microbial world through application-based learning, fostering curiosity, scientific thinking, and a strong conceptual foundation in microbiology. 02 Graduates will gain practical exposure to advanced microbiological techniques through hands-on training, while developing ethical values, professional behavior, and a responsible scientific attitude. 03 Graduates will be equipped for self-directed and lifelong learning, enabling them to recognize and fulfill their educational and professional aspirations in research, industry, healthcare, and other microbiology-related fields. 01 Disciplinary Knowledge and Problem Analyzing: The graduated young minds will be ignited to understand the world of microbes through application-based learning and to apply the knowledge in analyzing the problems related to various fields of life sciences for their solutions and enhances overall development and also equip with advanced microbial techniques by hands-on training and to inculcate ethics and professional attitude with problem solving skills. 02 Formulation and Design: The graduates will be trained to handle the advanced techniques of microbiology to formulate the solutions of variety of problems related to the real life and will be trained for self-directed learning, recognizing and continuing educational needs in occupying positions in research, industries and related organizations. XIIth with PCB with minimum 50% marks. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons/Hons with Research) Microbiology Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks.
